description: Date and time (ISO 8601, UTC) the cost record was captured for a billing interval.
business_meaning: Anchors every cost to a point in time, enabling daily / monthly trend analysis and anomaly detection by Finance and Engineering.

description: Name of the cloud service that generated the charge (e.g. Compute Engine, BigQuery, Cloud Storage).
business_meaning: Attributes spend to a specific managed service so teams can see which products drive the bill and target optimisation.

description: Deployment environment the cost belongs to (Production, Staging, Development).
business_meaning: Allocates spend across environments so non-production waste is visible and Production reliability spend is justified.

description: Cloud infrastructure cost in US dollars for the service and interval on this record.
business_meaning: Represents operational spending tracked by Finance and Engineering teams; the core measure for budgets, forecasts and cost KPIs.

description: Unique identifier for the infrastructure deployment event associated with the cost.
business_meaning: Links cloud spend back to a specific deployment so cost spikes can be traced to the change that caused them (root cause analysis).
